description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by a landscaped yard with a mix of large leafy trees and smaller shrubs. The house features a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout with large windows and sliding glass doors, allowing for ample natural light. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and dark gray, creating a striking contrast. A spacious patio and swimming pool are visible on one side, suggesting an emphasis on outdoor living. The property includes a driveway with a parked car and a fenced perimeter, providing privacy and security. The overall design is minimalist, with open spaces and a focus on geometric lines.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a pool, and landscaped yard, finished in white and dark gray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and dense landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the driveway, car, and a glimpse of the pool area with more open yard space.
description_view_2: Side view featuring the pool, patio, and extensive glass doors opening to the outdoor area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, and additional landscaping, with the house's geometric layout visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flush door, no steps, and surrounded by large windows and landscaping
